vllm.title: [TPU] Use mark_dynamic only for dummy run
vllm.author: WoosukKwon

vllm.title: [TPU] Optimize RoPE forward_native2
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR rewrites the forward_native2 method in RotaryEmbedding so that it's more compiler-friendly. On TPU, this removes redundant copy operations to the cos-sin cache, leading to ~10% latency reduction.
TODO:

Rewrite forward_native and merge forward_native2 into forward_native

vllm.title: [ Bugfix ] Fix Prometheus Metrics With `zeromq` Frontend
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

Prometheus metrics are broken in v0.5.4 due to zeromq multiprocessing frontend
Set PROMETHEUS_MULTIPROC_DIR environment variable to enable multiprocessing mode (note, this must be set before prometheus_client is imported. So we lazily init anything that imports prometheus_client
Use tempfi

vllm.title: [Misc] Refactor Llama3 RoPE initialization
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR refactors the Llama3 RoPE initialization. The PR includes the following changes:

Use the rope scaling values from HF config instead of the hardcoded ones.
Vectorize the calculation of inv_freq.

vllm.title: [Core] Use flashinfer sampling kernel when available
vllm.author: peng1999
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Flashinfer contains a combined kernel top_k_top_p_sampling_from_probs, and it is way faster than the sorting kernels used currently. This will eliminate the timely _apply_top_k_top_p function and reduce the GPU time of sampler.
